Off Calendar Mar-19-2024 Continued To Apr-30-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-23-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Maurice Abadia appearing via zoom for Bank of America, N.A. through its Merrill Lynch Trust Co. division. (petitioner)

Mr. Abadia stated that hey had no luck finding the original will and that he has not heard of any objections.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of LOST Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated February 27, 2014 is admitted to probate. Bank of America, N.A. through its Merrill Lynch Trust Co. division is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for July 16 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is to be filed two weeks prior to the hearing date. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported
